title: RandomFluidCows
body:
Cows that randomly spawns with fluids inside them. Just milk them.

### Currently integrated with:
- JEI
- TOP
- JADE

Send message if you want me to integrate a specific mod.

### Commands:

- **/moofluids create <fluid>** - spawns cow with given fluid.
- **/moofluids find** - finds nearby fluid cows.
